params.name: Noah's Ark
params.description:
On Jan 12, 2369 BC, passengers of Noah's Ark were rescued after stopping on Mt. Ararat.
God cursed mankind with a great flood, but he notified Noah's family in advance. Noah's 8 family members lived on the ark along with many birds and beasts. There was one mating pair of unclean animals and seven mating pairs of clean animals. When the flood came, only the animals on Noah's Ark were spared. After the flood, Noah's Ark was stranded on Mount Ararat. God then no longer cursed the earth for the …
